message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory

participant "AudioFileHeader" as AFH
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory" as AFA
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter" as AFP

AFH -> AFA: 1 audio id
AFA -> AFP: 2 audio id
AFP -> AFP: 3 edit sample and delete sample\ndialogs as render functions

opt if route is "Quick Save"
    AFP -> AFP: 4 assign sample dialog as render functions
end

AFP -> AFA: 5 list of render functions
AFA -> AFA: render drop-down menu\n6 and dialog render functions\nin render()

@enduml
```
